query:
-- Feeds confirmed working via live test (return valid RSS XML from sandbox):
-- mining-technology, offshore-technology, nsenergybusiness, pumpsandsystems, processonline, hydrocarbons-technology
-- These are failing in the pipeline due to Node.js fetch user-agent being blocked, not the URL itself
-- Reset their consecutive errors so they retry tonight with the improved UA

-- Also fix waterworld: the feed URL redirects to 404 — need to quarantine it
-- Also fix iaphworldports: still 403 — quarantine it

-- Reset error counters for feeds that are actually alive
UPDATE rssSources 
SET consecutiveErrors = 0, lastError = NULL
WHERE feedUrl IN (
  'https://www.mining-technology.com/feed/',
  'https://www.offshore-technology.com/feed/',
  'https://www.nsenergybusiness.com/feed/',
  'https://www.pumpsandsystems.com/rss.xml',
  'https://www.processonline.com.au/feed/',
  'https://www.hydrocarbons-technology.com/feed/'
);

-- Quarantine waterworld (404 after redirect) and iaphworldports (persistent 403)
UPDATE rssSources 
SET isActive = 0, consecutiveErrors = 99, lastError = 'Quarantined: URL dead or persistent 403'
WHERE feedUrl IN (
  'https://www.waterworld.com/feed/',
  'https://www.iaphworldports.org/news/rss'
);

-- Check final state
SELECT name, feedUrl, isActive, consecutiveErrors, LEFT(lastError, 60) as err
FROM rssSources
WHERE consecutiveErrors > 0 OR isActive = 0
ORDER BY consecutiveErrors DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute

-- Reset their consecutive errors so they retry tonight with the improved UA

-- Also fix waterworld: the feed URL redirects to 404 — need to quarantine it
-- Also fix iaphworldports: still 403 — quarantine it

-- Reset error counters for feeds that are actually alive
UPDATE rssSources 
SET consecutiveErrors = 0, lastError = NULL
WHERE feedUrl IN (
  'https://www.mining-technology.com/feed/',
  'https://www.offshore-technology.com/feed/',
  'https://www.nsenergybusiness.com/feed/',
  'https://www.pumpsandsystems.com/rss.xml',
  'https://www.processonline.com.au/feed/',
  'https://www.hydrocarbons-technology.com/feed/'
);

-- Quarantine waterworld (404 after redirect) and iaphworldports (persistent 403)
UPDATE rssSources 
SET isActive = 0, consecutiveErrors = 99, lastError = 'Quarantined: URL dead or persistent 403'
WHERE feedUrl IN (
  'https://www.waterworld.com/feed/',
  'https://www.iaphworldports.org/news/rss'
);

-- Check final state
SELECT name, feedUrl, isActive, consecutiveErrors, LEFT(lastError, 60) as err
FROM rssSources
WHERE consecutiveErrors > 0 OR isActive = 0
ORDER BY consecutiveErrors DESC;
